title: Front Office Manager - Marriott India - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Marriott India - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Marriott India! We are hiring a Front Office Manager for our Agra team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Marriott India:
Marriott India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in MICE

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Marriott India!
